// Tailwind directives: @tailwind / @apply / @layer are valid in this project. Tell the built-in CSS linter to stop flagging them and let the Tailwind CSS IntelliSense extension take over.
VSCode's embedded CSS parser sees `${expr}` and panics with css-rcurlyexpected / property-value-expected. These attributes are validated by Astro/TS — turn the embedded CSS validator off so we don't get false positives.
